raw_consumer_statement:
I opened a Bloomingdales credit card thru Citi bank in XXXX. I attempted to utilize the card within days of being approved, as well as a follow up attempt to use the card once I received my physical card. 

Both times, an order placed online at the specific stores website, XXXX, was made by me. However both purchases were immediately and very clearly canceled by the store. At the stores discretion they refused to ship me my purchase. No purchase was ever completed with this card This also happens to be the 3rd card Ive had now that was issued by Citi bank and they all have done this same exact thing to me.
